underlying_goal: Deliberate on architectural decisions for a notification system (claude-notify/hearkn) and verify runtime behavior of Claude Code hooks to inform design choices
friction_detail: Debug hooks added mid-session weren't hot-reloaded by Claude Code, requiring a second session to collect data.
brief_summary: User wanted to deliberate on notification architecture decisions and verify Claude Code hook behavior at runtime; achieved both with a major finding that PermissionRequest doesn't fire, reshaping the design.
